details.IncidentDetail: "[2] PARTY RAN IFO SEMI AND BACK TO RHS "

"[36] TEH SO IS INQ IF THE RDWY STILL NEEDS TO BE BLOCKED // THE UNIT SEES TRFC STARTING TO MOVE [Shared]"

"[24] VEH ROLLED OVER // VEH IS ON ITS ROOF // RP IS STILL IN THE VEH [Shared]"
"[21] RP ADVD THERE WAS AN ANIMAL IN THE RDWY AND SHE SWERVED TO AVOID HITTING IT [Shared]"
"[20] RP IS NOT ABLE TO GET OUT OF THE VEH [Shared]"

"[10] RP ADVING SHE CAN SEE THE RDWY "

"[3] RP IS IN A WHI TOTY 4RN // UNSURE IF SHE IS VISIBLE FROM THE RDWY"
"[9] RP STATED TO THE VEHICLE TRYING TO PARK IN HIS DRIVEWAY THAT HE WOULD HAVE HER TOWED"
"[7] RP IS VERY FRUSTRATED AND WAS STANDING IN HIS DRIVEWAY BC THERE WAS A VEHICLE BACKING UP INTO HIS DRIVEWAY NOW"
